texto: Maybe your college professor taught that the legacy of colonialism explains Third World poverty. That’s nonsense as well. Canada was a colony. So were Australia, New Zealand and Hong Kong. In fact, the richest country in the world, the United States, was once a colony. By contrast, Ethiopia, Liberia, Tibet, Sikkim, Nepal and Bhutan were never colonies, but they are home to the world’s poorest people.
explicacao: Citação de Walter Williams sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Maybe your college professor taught that the legacy of colonialism explains Third World poverty. …” articula reflexao, colonialism, history em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como history e liberal-lies.
